titles.title: 大槌超神楽ダイハンマー

data.title: Ootsuchi Chou Kagura Dai Hammer
data.title_japanese: 大槌超神楽ダイハンマー
data.synopsis:
Mitora Ootsuchi, who belongs to the tourism department of Ootsuchi Town Hall, is doing a rehearsal with other staff to promote the town. While touring various spots, such as the Gensui River and Kozuchi Shrine, a demon beast suddenly attacks. Ootsuchi and her friends are now faced with saving the town.

(Source: YouTube, translated)

data.title: Unmei no Makimodoshi
data.synopsis:
A secret organization known as the Spacetime Police Special Task Force, nicknamed the "Rewinders," exists to save those who have died tragic, untimely death. Their weapon, the "Retry Eye," is a time machine implanted in their right eye. To solve each case, they'll rewind time dozens, hundreds, even thousands of times, until the future is changed.

(Source: MAL News)

data.synopsis: A special video for the Tori no Uta OP from Air which was included in the Blu-ray release of the series. It contains original animation covering scenes from the visual novel that were not shown in the series.

titles.title: Chocola et Vanilla - Sugar Sugar Rune

data.title: Sugar Sugar Rune (Unknown)
title_synonyms: Chocola et Vanilla - Sugar Sugar Rune
data.synopsis:
The queen of the Magical World is selected through a competition in which two young witches travel to the Human World to gather the hearts of boys who fall in love with them. This time, best friends Chocolat Meilleure and Vanilla Mieux, the daughters of the previous queen candidates, enroll in a human school in order to commence the challenge. Aided by their familiar spirits and mentor Rockin Robin, the young witches learn to adjust to human life as each aims to become the next queen.

Chocolat, who is popular with boys in the Magical World, finds that her strategies do not work well for capturing human hearts. In contrast, Vanilla's quiet and shy personality seems to make her the center of attraction. To make matters more complicated, a mysterious boy by the name of Pierre Tempête de Neige seems to be after Chocolat's heart. The two witches' friendship is put to the test as the competition intensifies.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.synopsis:
Follows the daily life of Kai Ootsuchi, the image character of Ootsuchi Station on the Sanriku Railway, living in the town and working day and night.

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.synopsis:
The picture books center on a piece of bread that also steals bread from bakeries in the city.

(Source: ANN)

data.title: Kimi shika Inai
data.synopsis:
Hamster Koro-chan and parakeet Piyo-chan are very fond of their owner Miho-chan. Today, the two are trying to get Miho to play with them, but she's so engrossed in her phone call that she doesn't pay them any attention! They have no choice but to give up. But then they realize that Miho-chan is in danger...!?

(Source: YouTube, translated)
data.background: Graduate Work 2019 from Mai Shizuse, Osaka University of Arts.

titles.title: Tomica Heroes Jobraver: Tokusou Gattai Robo (TV)
トミカヒーローズ ジョブレイバー 特装合体ロボ

data.title: Tomica Heroes Jobraver: Tokusou Gattai Robo (TV)
data.title_japanese: トミカヒーローズ ジョブレイバー 特装合体ロボ
data.synopsis:
The anime features "Braver" units, which combine job-related robots called "Jobroids" with "Armor Tomica" automobiles related to police, fire fighters, emergency medical personnel, trash collecting, and construction.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: あんまり役に立たない日本史

data.title: Anmari Yakunitatanai Nihonshi
data.title_japanese: あんまり役に立たない日本史
data.synopsis:
A historical variety show in which history-loving comedian Junpei of the duo Syrup delivers animated retellings of historical figures and events that "probably wouldn't even be on a test" and "there's no benefit to knowing"!

(Source: YouTube)

data.title: Mao
data.synopsis:
Nanoka passes through a portal into the Taisho era, where exorcist Mao reluctantly rescues her from the jaws of a grotesque yokai. When Nanoka gets back to the present, she discovers she has some new, incredible abilities. She returns to the past looking for answers, only to get caught up in Mao's investigation of a series of gruesome murders. As her questions about herself multiply, Nanoka learns that Mao is cursed by a cat demon named Byoki—and so is his sword. If anyone but Mao attempts to wield it, they are doomed. But when Mao's life is in jeopardy, Nanoka picks up his blade and swings!

(Source: VIZ Media)

data.title: Kami no Niwatsuki Kusunoki-tei
data.synopsis:
Deep in the countryside, Minato Kusunoki is left in charge of a terrifying house overflowing with evil spirits—or at least it was, until his extraordinary ability cleared them all out! Instead, a procession of unique and peculiar gods is drawn to the comfort of the purified Kusunoki residence, and Minato spends his days relaxing in the company of his spiritual neighbors. What else lies in store for Minato as he lives peacefully surrounded by gods?

(Source: Yen Press)
data.background: Kami no Niwatsuki Kusunoki-tei aired on TV Asahi's NUMAnimation block.

titles.title: Grow Up Show: Himawari no Circus-dan
グロウアップショウ ～ひまわりのサーカス団～

data.title: Grow Up Show: Himawari no Circus-dan
data.title_japanese: グロウアップショウ ～ひまわりのサーカス団～
data.synopsis:
In Japan during the height of its economic boom in the mid-1950s, the circus was a form of entertainment that became a central part of many people's lives. The best troupes are permitted to participate in the world-renowned "Circus Collection" festival, and many come from all over Japan to compete daily.

The story centers on the struggling "Sunflower Circus" troupe, led by ringmaster Maria, and a new prodigy that joins their ranks for unknown reasons: Mizuka Tsurumaki.

Is her encounter with the highly individual members of the Sunflower Circus troupe a coincidence or destiny? This one-of-a-kind circus show depicting young girls chasing their dreams begins!

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Muri Muri Shinkaron
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Muri Muri Shinkaron by Akari Nanawo. The song was used as the opening theme of the anime Watashi ga Koibito ni Nareru Wake Nai jan, Muri Muri! (※Muri ja Nakatta!?).
